---
title: "Personal"
subtitle: "Things I make when I'm not at a keyboard or a bench"
toc: true
---

This page is just a placeholder with some dummy text, it's moe about experimenting with Quarto layout than anyting else!

## Ceramics

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![Stoneware vessel · 2025](img/ceramics/placeholder-01.svg){group="ceramics"}

![Porcelain bowl · 2024](img/ceramics/placeholder-02.svg){group="ceramics"}

![Tea bowl, wood-fired · 2025](img/ceramics/placeholder-03.svg){group="ceramics"}

![Faceted jar · 2024](img/ceramics/placeholder-04.svg){group="ceramics"}

![Slip-decorated plate · 2025](img/ceramics/placeholder-05.svg){group="ceramics"}

![Bottle form · 2025](img/ceramics/placeholder-06.svg){group="ceramics"}
:::

## Photography

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Madonna di Campiglio, Dolomites · 2026](img/photo/placeholder-01.svg){group="photo"}

![Reading riverside, late autumn · 2024](img/photo/placeholder-02.svg){group="photo"}

![East Tyrol approach, dusk · 2025](img/photo/placeholder-03.svg){group="photo"}

![Studio, working light · 2025](img/photo/placeholder-04.svg){group="photo"}
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Notes on the work

Both also reward patience in a way the rest of my work doesn't.
:::
